reasoning: The SOC2 control CC7.2 focuses on monitoring system components for anomalies indicative of security events. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring audit logging is enabled and properly configured to capture and retain logs for analysis. Additionally, implementing NetworkPolicies and Admission Controllers can help detect and prevent anomalous network and API activities, respectively, which are indicative of potential security incidents.
title: CC7.2 The entity monitors system components and the operation of those components for anomalies that are indicative of malicious acts, natural disasters, and errors affecting the entity's ability to meet its objectives; anomalies are analyzed to determine whether they represent security events
